name: the-containers
description: A lightweight dashboard, reverse proxy controller, and self-host deployment manager.
author: Alexander-Hung

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @the-containers/api" "npm run dev -w @the-containers/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @the-containers/api && npm run build -w @the-containers/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @the-containers/api && npm run lint -w @the-containers/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @the-containers/api && npm run typecheck -w @the-containers/web
